title: A Resolution Approving the Sangguniang Kabataan Annual Budget of Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna for the Year 2022 in the Amount of One Million One Hundred Seventy Seven Thousand Eight Hundred Five Pesos and 30/100 Only (P 1,177,805.30). (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 7/11/2022)
